# InFlightTracker.Register method

Registers *id* as in-flight for an outgoing request.

```csharp
public void Register(RequestId id)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| id | The identifier of the request being sent. |

## Exceptions

| exception | condition |
| --- | --- |
| InvalidOperationException | Thrown when *id* is already in-flight, indicating a reuse violation (R-3.2-c, R-3.2-d). |
